Fill predefined text easily via '/', supporting multi-format inputs across scenarios and languages

🚀  Introduction

TextFill is a powerful Chrome browser extension designed to enhance text input efficiency. Through custom commands and smart templates, users can quickly fill predefined text content in input fields on any webpage.

✨  Key Features

- ⚡ Zero-delay response
- 🎯 Quick trigger with custom commands, without interrupting editing
- 📖 Command panel with fuzzy matching, no memorization needed
- 📝 Dynamic text replacement with current time, date, etc.
- 🎨 Smart cursor positioning
- 📋 Clipboard content integration
- 🎆 Completion fireworks effect
- 🌍 Multi-language support
- 🎨 Support for multiple themes

🛠️  How to Use

1. Type `/` or `、` in any input field to trigger the command panel
2. Press `Tab` to fill with the first matching text
3. `Click` to select the text you want to fill
4. When the command fully matches, text will be filled automatically

📖  Command Syntax

Supports the following dynamic placeholders:

| Placeholder | Description                        |
|---------------------|----------------------------------------|
| {{date}}         | Insert current date           |
| {{time}}         | Insert current time           |
| {{cursor}}      | Set cursor position          |
| {{clipboard}} | Insert clipboard content |

🔧 Custom Settings

1. Click the plugin icon to open the settings panel
2. Add/Edit custom commands

❇️ Who We Are

We are XperInsight, where XperInsight = Experience Insight. We are creating a new world focused on user experience!

❇️ More

🚀TextFill is not just an extension; it's your productivity booster and work-life balance assistant. Click "Add to Chrome" now, and let's shape the future together.

📪If you have any questions or feedback, please feel free to contact us at xperinsight@gmail.com. We're always here to help.
A smart clipboard manager that helps you organize and access your clipboard history.

🚀 Supercharge Your Productivity with Smart Clipboard Manager! 🖱️

Smart Clipboard Manager is a browser extension that detects and save, manage, modify, and tag all of your copied items in one place for seamless, efficient, and secure workflow.


What Does It Do?

Automatically Save Clipboard History: Never lose a copied text, link, or image again. Everything you copy is securely stored for quick access.

Search & Categorize with Ease: Quickly find items using full-text search or organize them with custom categories and tags.
Multi-Format Support: Handles text, links, and even images effortlessly.

Privacy First: Your data is encrypted and stored securely, ensuring complete privacy.

Cloud Sync: Access your clipboard history across multiple devices—sync it all with ease!

Customizable & User-Friendly: Intuitive design, drag-and-drop organization, and keyboard shortcuts to save time.


Why Install Smart Clipboard Manager?

💡 Boost Efficiency: Save time by having your clipboard history at your fingertips.
🔍 Stay Organized: Manage your copied items in a clean and categorized way.
🔐 Prioritize Privacy: End-to-end encryption ensures your data stays yours.
🌍 Work Anywhere: Premium cloud sync keeps your history updated across devices.
✅ Designed for You: Easy to use, customizable, and built for multitaskers.


Who Is It For?

Whether you’re a student, professional, developer, or multitasker, Smart Clipboard Manager will streamline your daily tasks and make copy-paste frustration a thing of the past.

keywords:
Clipboard manager, clipboard history, Chrome extension, productivity tools, copy-paste manager, clipboard sync, clipboard organizer, cloud clipboard, clipboard privacy, clipboard encryption, clipboard for multitaskers.


We Value Your Feedback

We’re committed to making Smart Clipboard Manager the best it can be! If you have any constructive feedback or suggestions for improvement, feel free to reach out to us at zxtechx@gmail.com. We'd love to hear from you!
Pseudonymisez les donnees personnelles avant de les coller dans un chat LLM. Conforme RGPD (Art. 4(5)).

PseudoShield pseudonymise automatiquement vos données personnelles avant de les coller dans un assistant IA. L'extension intercepte le Ctrl+V, détecte plus de 35 types de données (noms, NISS, IBAN, emails, téléphones, adresses, cartes bancaires…), les remplace par des pseudonymes déterministes (SHA-256) et insère le texte nettoyé. L'IA ne voit jamais vos données réelles.

Fonctionnalités :
- 35 patterns de détection avec validation mathématique (Luhn, mod 97, ISO 13616)
- Journal RGPD conforme Art. 30 (export CSV/JSON)
- Table de correspondance pseudonyme / original
- Catégorisation Art. 4 / Art. 9 en temps réel
- 100 % local : zéro télémétrie, aucun serveur, aucun compte

Compatible avec les principales interfaces de chat IA. Liste des plateformes supportées et code source : https://github.com/MaitreJV/pseudoshield

Idéal pour avocats, DPO, médecins, RH, comptables et tout professionnel soumis au secret.
IELTS Writing in Google Docs by Scribo

Get ready for your IELTS writing test with Scribo, the must-have tool for students determined to elevate their English writing skills. Trusted by some of the most rigorous educational systems worldwide, Scribo’s intuitive AI helps you practice and perfect your writing, giving you the edge you need to excel in your English writing test.

Scribo provides you with personalized feedback on your writing and gives you an indicative score based on the same rubrics used in the exam, helping you see how your work measures up against the standard. Instantly identify areas of strength and weakness—whether it's grammar, structure, or argumentation—and receive tailored suggestions to improve your essays.

Writing is widely recognized as one of the most challenging parts of the IELTS exam. With Scribo, you can track your progress over time and watch your score grow by focusing on specific writing goals, and fine-tuning your skills to confidently face the exam. Join the community of students using Scribo to make exam preparation easier and more effective, one essay at a time.

Potencialize sua experiência no WhatsApp Web com essa extensão.

Potencialize sua experiência no WhatsApp Web com essa extensão.

- ✅ Ícone de Acesso Rápido: Adiciona um ícone do WhatsApp na barra do navegador para abrir uma interface com um campo de input para digitar ou colar um número de telefone, junto com um botão "Abrir" ou "Falar".
- ✅ Abrir no WhatsApp com Botão Direito: Permite selecionar um texto, clicar com o botão direito e escolher a opção "Abrir no WhatsApp". O número é formatado e o link para o WhatsApp é aberto.
- ✅ Colar da Área de Transferência: Possibilidade de colar automaticamente o conteúdo da área de transferência ao abrir a interface de acesso rápido.
- ✅ Abrir Sidebar no WhatsApp Web: Para usar funções avançadas
- ✅ Templates de Mensagens: Oferece a opção de utilizar templates de mensagens para facilitar o envio de mensagens para contatos.
- ✅ Autenticação com Google Contatos : Agora é possível autenticar-se com a conta do Google para facilitar o processo de salvar contatos e ter acesso rápido aos contatos já adicionados.
- ✅ Opção de Abertura por WhatsApp Web ou Desktop: Agora, a extensão apresenta um menu de configurações. Dentro desse menu, há uma opção chamada "Abrir preferencialmente por", que permite escolher entre "WhatsApp Web" e "WhatsApp Desktop". Essa preferência determina como os links serão gerados, seja no campo de input, ao abrir seus contatos do google ou ao clicar no ícone próximo aos números. Essa configuração é salva localmente para facilitar o uso futuro.
- ✅ Atalho na Barra Lateral : Agora, na barra lateral, você tem um campo para inserir um número e abrir o WhatsApp Web com apenas um clique em "Abrir". Permite iniciar uma conversa com um contato já existente ou um novo chat.
- ✅ Etiquetas para Contatos : Adiciona a funcionalidade de marcar contatos com etiquetas, como "Lead", "Negociando", "Agendado", "Proposta", "Contrato", "Cliente", "Perdido". Essas etiquetas são armazenadas lista de chats. Também é possível filtrar chats por etiqueta na coluna de chats.

Nota: Este é um resumo das funcionalidades já implementadas. O projeto pode estar em constante evolução e receber atualizações adicionais.
A modern video player that handles formats and codecs your browser can't play natively — right in your browser.

Movi Player lets you play video formats your browser can't handle natively — right in a new tab.

Paste a video URL or open a file from your computer. Formats that normally require dedicated apps just work instantly in your browser.

Features:
• Paste & Play — copy a video link, click the extension, done
• Play from Computer — open any video file from your device
• Right-click any video link → "Open with Movi Player"
• Play button overlay on detected video links
• Full player controls, seek, subtitles, multi-audio tracks
• HDR rendering on supported displays
• No server needed — everything runs in your browser

Powered by WebCodecs + FFmpeg WebAssembly.
Open source: github.com/MrUjjwalG/movi-player
Copy Please! - Clean, Format & Auto Copy Text Anywhere
Automatically copy selected text to clipboard and allow copying by removing copy protection.

Copy Please! makes it easy to autocopy text the moment you select it - no more Ctrl+C.
It also unlocks sites that block copying, right-click, or text selection, and helps you clean up text on the way to the clipboard.

What it does

Auto-copy when you select text
Drag, double-click, or triple-click - the text is already on your clipboard. Choose plain text or rich (formatted) text, and switch between them with a key when you need to.

Unlock blocked sites
Bring back copy, right-click, and text selection on sites that disable them. Works on tricky sites where other extensions give up.

Clean up text automatically
- Strip hidden AI characters, em-dashes, fancy quotes, and emoji.
- Change the case - UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, leet, and more.
- Trim whitespace from the start and end of what you copy.
- Add the source URL, page title, date or time to every copy, using a template you control.

Find & replace with regex
If you want more control, there's a dedicated Regex tab with:
- A live tester so you can see what your rule does before saving.
- Quick Insert buttons and a cheat sheet if you're new to regex.
- Many ready-made examples for common tasks: collapse extra blank lines, pull all emails or links out of a block of text, mask credit card numbers, strip Markdown, redact emails before sharing logs, and more.

Middle-click paste
Paste with your middle mouse button

Clipboard management
- Automatically clear your clipboard after a set time, or after you paste.
- Replace whatever's already in a field when you paste, instead of adding to it.

Per-site control
- Four toggles per site and regex rule: Auto-copy, Unlock text selection, Unlock right-click and Regex with rule id.
- Turn any of them on everywhere with one switch.
- One-click toggle from the toolbar to enable/disable on the current site.
- Alt+Shift+click copies text from buttons and links without actually clicking them (great for grabbing the text of buttons, links or other clickable elements).

Notifications
Get a small on-screen indicator or a system notification when something is copied. Position it wherever you like.

Why use it
- Stop pressing Ctrl+C. Selecting is copying.
- Get text out of stubborn sites. Most copy-blocked pages just work.
- Cleaner clipboard. Strip the junk on the way out, not after.
- Stays private. No accounts, no tracking, no data leaves your computer.

Good to know
- Works on almost every website.
- To use it on local files (file:/// URLs), check Allow access to file URLs on the extension's details page.
- Most settings apply right away - no need to reload tabs.
- Auto-copy doesn't work in Google Docs or Word Online (those use a special canvas-based editor). Use Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V in those.

CHANGELOG
## [0.16.0]  - 2026-05-28
- New option for notifications to appear near cursor
- Toggle for remove whitespace
- Bugfixes

## [0.15.0]  - 2026-05-24
- New Logo
- Unlock text defeats "stretched-link" card overlays
- Fixed duplicate domain_list rows when popup paths preserved URL case.

## [0.14.0]  - 2026-05-23
- Custom Regex is now a library of named rules. The Regex tab's old "single rule" + "Advanced (multi-line)" duo is replaced by a Saved rules list.
- Per-site rule picker in the popup. A new Rule dropdown appears under the Custom Regex toggle
- Per-pattern rule picker in the Activation list. Each URL-patterns row gains a compact `#N` select between the regex switch and the edit button.

## [0.13.0]  - 2026-05-20
- Custom regex is now per-site. 
- !-prefix negation is gone. Per-page negation rows aren't needed anymore - a row at the exact pattern is the override.
- Added a Custom regex find/replace options page with built-in helpers (live tester, Quick Insert palette, cheat sheet, examples grouped by category)

## [0.12.0]  - 2026-05-17
- Negation patterns by typing '!example.com', to block a whole site via negation, type '!example.com/*' explicitly
- Added an Advanced mode to the Custom Regex case-conversion option on the Format tab. The new multi-line textarea takes one '/pattern/flags::replacement' rule per line and applies them top-to-bottom on the copied text.

## [0.11.0]  - 2026-05-13
- Unified the autocopy allow/deny list and the per-domain unlocks into a single domain list with three switches per row
- The popup now shows three toggles for the current domain (autocopy / text-select / right-click) and changes now hot-apply with no tab reload

## [0.10.0]  - 2026-05-12
- Unlock text selection now works in significantly more places.
- Removed the "Block drag-and-drop on draggable elements" toggle. 
- Improved the drag-then-click suppression

## [0.9.0]  - 2026-05-11
- Added "Block drag-and-drop on draggable elements" sub-toggle under Unlock text selection — lets you mouse-select text inside `draggable="true"` elements (e.g. Gmail inbox rows) 
- Added "Unlock text selection" and "Unlock right click" toggles to the popup under a new "Global unlocks" section so the two global settings can be flipped without opening Options
- Middle-click paste now places the caret at the click point
- Fixed Alt+Shift click-to-copy on buttons and links not running text transforms — case conversion, AI-character removal, and the comment template now apply the same way as auto-copy
- Bugfixes

## [0.8.0]  - 2026-05-09
- Added a modifier key option to skip "Replace existing text on paste" for one paste
- Added a modifier key option to swap between Plain and Rich copy format for a single copy
- Added autoscroll suppression on middle-click into text fields when "Paste on Middle Click"
- Added Popup with settings to enable/disable extension on site/domain
 -Fixed bugs

## [0.0.7]  - 2026-05-03
- Added Alt/Opt+Shift Click to copy text from buttons, links, and form buttons without triggering them
- Added Rich Text (HTML) copy format option that preserves formatting when pasting into apps like Word or Google Docs
- Added "Replace existing text instead of appending" option that clears the target field on any paste 
- Added keyboard shortcut (Alt+Shift+P by default, rebindable at chrome://extensions/shortcuts) to toggle the extension on the current site

## [0.0.6]  - 2026-04-06
- Fixed bugs

## [0.0.5]  - 2026-01-06
- Added option to remove "AI Characters" when copying

## [0.0.4]  - 2025-12-02
- Fixed minor bugs
- Replaced code so notification element are not depented on the screen resolution used when setup

## [0.0.3]  - 2025-04-29
- Fixed small bug for TitleCase format
- Fixed extension not loaded when refreshing on certain pages
- Added Levels to Cursed Case

## [0.0.2]  - 2025-04-27
- Small fix for native notifications 

## [0.0.1]  - 2025-04-24
- Intital Release!

Scriptionary acts as a repository for various ServiceNow client and server side code snippets. Users can quickly save and paste…

Scriptionary acts as a repository for various ServiceNow client and server side code snippets. Users can quickly save and paste code on the fly using the built in context menu or adding a script utilizing the pop out mode.

Scriptionary features an inline script editor with a multi-tab capable system, allowing the storage of full code snippets in a single file

Features:
- 55+ common code snippets
- Context menu system that allows you to save and load code snippets on the fly

INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Download the application
2. Pin the application to the chrome toolbar
3. Open the application and open the guide from the hamburger menu for getting started


NOTE: Pin mode was replaced with Pop out mode due to temporary technical limitations
Automatically copies text when selected and pastes when input field is focused

🪄 **ZeroClick Copy & Paste - Next-Generation Text Operation Automation Tool!**

Select to copy, click to paste, choose from history.  
A Chrome extension that completely automates daily copy & paste operations and further improves productivity with clipboard history.

---

### 🚀 **Latest Features (v1.2)**

#### 📋 **Clipboard History Function**
- 🔄 **Save up to 10 history items** - Automatically save copied text to history
- 📜 **History list display** - History dropdown appears when clicking input fields
- 🖱 **One-click selection** - Instantly paste text from history with mouse click
- 🔒 **Security consideration** - No history display in password fields
- ⚙️ **Configurable** - Toggle history function ON/OFF from popup

#### 🛡 **Enhanced Error Handling**
- 🔄 **Fallback functionality** - Alternative methods when clipboard reading fails
- 🐦 **Improved SNS support** - Stable operation even on strict sites like Twitter/X
- 🙋 **User-friendly** - Can select from history even when errors occur

---

### 🎯 **Basic Features**

- 🖱 **Automatic copy just by selecting text**  
- 📥 **Automatic paste just by clicking input fields** (※Optional)  
- 🌐 **Site-specific settings** - Can disable function only on specific sites
- ✏ **Copy in text boxes can be disabled** (※Disabled by default)  
- 🔔 **Subtle notifications in top-right for copy/paste success**  
- 🎛 **Easy ON/OFF toggle from extension icon**  
- 🌐 **6-language support** - Japanese, English, Korean, Spanish, French, Chinese

---

### 🛠 **How to Use**

1. **Install the extension**  
2. **Click the extension icon in browser's top-right**  
3. **Toggle main switch to enable/disable functionality**  
4. **Control the following features from detailed settings:**  
   - Auto-paste ON/OFF  
   - Allow/prohibit copy in text boxes  
   - **🆕 Clipboard history ON/OFF**  
   - **🆕 Site-specific enable/disable settings**

---

### 🎮 **Usage Examples**

#### **Traditional workflow**
1. Select text → Copy with Ctrl+C
2. Click input field → Paste with Ctrl+V
3. Want to use previous text → Search and copy again

#### **Using this extension**
1. **Select text** → **Automatically copied!**
2. **Click input field** → **History list appears, just select to paste!**
3. **Past text also instantly selectable from history!**

---

### 🔧 **Debug Features**

- **Ctrl + Shift + Z** to display debug panel  
- Check current site's configuration status  
- Display all site settings list  
- Site settings reset function

---

### ⚠ **Notes**

- Auto-paste only works on HTTPS sites (Chrome specification)  
- May not work on some websites due to security settings  
- No auto-paste or history display for password fields and other sensitive fields  
- No auto-copy for keyboard selections like Ctrl+A  
- Clipboard history saves up to 10 items, automatically deleting oldest ones

---

### 🎯 **Recommended for**

- 📝 **Writers & Bloggers** - Frequently copy & paste text
- 💼 **Business professionals** - Want efficiency in email and document creation  
- 🎓 **Students & Researchers** - Handle lots of text in research and report writing
- 💻 **Programmers** - Want to streamline code and command input
- 🌐 **Multilingual users** - Operating environment supporting 6 languages

---

**Make copy & paste effortless, further boost productivity with history.**  
**The next-generation extension recommended for those who want smoother work!**

### 🔗 **Support & Feedback**

- GitHub: https://github.com/Orion-Asahi/07_auto-copy-n-past
- Bug reports and feature requests are welcome via GitHub Issues

Add a Download button to Pinterest posts for quick video saving

Pinterest Video Downloader – Pingrab is a free, lightweight, and secure Chrome extension that allows you to download Pinterest videos and images in one simple click. Designed for creators, students, and everyday Pinterest users, this tool adds a clean and handy Download button directly on every post (pin) and video you see on Pinterest.

Whether you want to save a DIY tutorial, a cooking recipe, a fashion clip, or a design idea, Pinterest Video Downloader makes it incredibly easy. Once installed, it automatically adds a “Download” button that appears when you hover over any pin. With one click, the extension copies the pin link, opens the Pingrab.net website, pastes the link automatically, and starts the download for you.

This extension eliminates the need for manually copying and pasting links into external downloader sites — saving time, clicks, and effort.

⚙️ Key Features

🖱️ One-click download button – Adds a visible “Download” button on every Pinterest pin and video.

🚀 Automatic download process – The extension copies the pin link, opens Pingrab.net, pastes the link, and clicks the download button automatically.

🎥 Download videos in high quality – Supports MP4 videos in HD and Full HD resolution.

🖼️ Save Pinterest images – Works not only with videos but also with static or carousel images.

🔒 Safe and private – The extension doesn’t collect or share any user data; all actions happen locally in your browser.

🌎 No login required – You don’t need to sign in to Pinterest or any other service to use it.

⚡ Fast and lightweight – Minimal performance impact, optimized for Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.

💻 Cross-platform support – Works smoothly on Windows, macOS, ChromeOS, and Linux.

🆓 Completely free – No hidden fees, subscriptions, or watermarks.

🧩 How It Works

Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.

Open Pinterest.com as you normally would.

Hover your mouse over any video or image pin you’d like to download.

Click the red “Download” button that appears in the corner.

The extension automatically:

Copies the pin’s URL to your clipboard

Opens Pingrab.net

Pastes the link

Clicks the Download button for you

Within seconds, your video or image is ready to be saved to your device.

This seamless workflow ensures you spend less time on repetitive steps and more time collecting inspiration, tutorials, and creative ideas from Pinterest.

💡 Why You’ll Love Pinterest Video Downloader – Pingrab

Save time: No need to open a separate tab, copy the URL, or paste it into a third-party site. Everything happens automatically.

Perfect for creators: Quickly save Pinterest videos and images for reference, editing, or inspiration.

Ideal for students and designers: Download educational and design content from Pinterest for offline study.

No annoying ads or pop-ups: The extension is ad-free and distraction-free.

Works worldwide: Fully compatible with Pinterest in all regions and languages.

Regularly updated: The code is optimized to match Pinterest’s latest interface changes.

Whether you’re a content creator, marketer, or casual Pinterest user, Pinterest Video Downloader – Pingrab is your ultimate companion for collecting and saving Pinterest content effortlessly.

🔐 Privacy and Permissions

Pinterest Video Downloader – Pingrab requests minimal permissions for full functionality:

No cookies, passwords, or private user data are collected or transmitted.
The extension only runs on the following domains:

pinterest.com

pingrab.net

Your clipboard and browsing data remain completely secure.

🧠 Performance and Reliability

The extension runs silently in the background without slowing down your browser.

Uses efficient DOM observation to detect new pins as you scroll through Pinterest.

Automatically adds the Download button to new content loaded dynamically.

Works with both the standard Pinterest feed and pin close-up pages.

Supports light and dark themes.

Defly is Algorand’s first DeFi wallet app redefining decentralized trading. Charts, swaps, stats, wallets in one mobile app, with full Algorand composability. We combined the best features of traditional crypto trading and real-time portfolio monitoring with the independence and security of DeFi.

The Defly app connects to the Algorand ecosystem. It links to any existing Algorand wallet and displays analytics and stats based on the publicly available data on the blockchain. For the full feature set (trading and sending funds) the app can safely store your private keys. These keys are stored locally and fully encrypted.

Defly app is compatible with iOS and Android and connects to the Algorand protocol. It links to any existing algorand wallet address and displays charts and metrics of both the market and personal trading performance. To write to the Algorand protocol (sending funds, trading) Defly can savekeep the user's private keys. It stores these keys locally and fully encrypted similar to the official Algorand Wallet, in a non-custodial way.

XPath Copier - GTM optimized tool for copying XPath, Element ID, and CSS Selectors with built-in variables integration.

XPath Copying Extension allows you to efficiently copy XPath in two different ways while working on web pages:

Context Menu

Right-click on any element and select “Copy XPath” to instantly copy the full XPath of that element to your clipboard.
Popup Interface

Click the extension icon to open a small popup where you can enter an XPath expression. With a single click, copy the text content of all elements that match the entered XPath on the active page, and view the results within the popup.
Who Is It For?

Ideal for software developers, testers, QA teams, and anyone involved in web scraping and automation.
Simplifies the process of quickly obtaining XPath selectors or copying text content corresponding to a specific XPath expression.
Key Features

One-click copying of the right-clicked element's XPath.
Bulk copying of text content for elements matching a user-specified XPath.
Extremely easy to install and use.
Accelerate your development, testing, and automation workflows by installing the XPath Copying Extension today!
クリップボード画像に一瞬で注釈を。Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Vで起動、そのままペースト。

「スクリーンショットを撮る → 加工アプリで編集 → 保存 → アップロード」 ...そんな面倒な作業はもう不要です！

Annotation Paste は、クリップボードにある画像に、ブラウザ上で直接「注釈（アノテーション）」を加えられる画期的な拡張機能です。

ショートカットキー Cmd + Shift + V（Windowsは Ctrl + Shift + V）を押すだけで編集画面がオーバーレイ表示されます。そのまま直感的なツールで編集し、Cmd + V を押すだけで、メールやチャット、ドキュメントに即座に貼り付けることができます。

✨ 主な特徴:

⚡️ 爆速起動: 画像をコピーした状態で Cmd + Shift + V を押すだけ。
🖌️ 直感的なツール: ペン、矢印、四角形、テキスト入力に対応。
🎨 5色のパレット: 赤・青・緑・黒・白 をクリックで切り替え。
↩️ 安心のUndo機能: 失敗しても Cmd + Z（またはUndoボタン）で元に戻せます。
📋 シームレスな連携: 編集が終われば自動的にクリップボードにコピー済み。あとは Cmd + V（Windowsは Ctrl + V）で貼り付けるだけ。
🔍 拡大・縮小: Zoom In/Out ボタン、または Cmd + Shift + > / < で細部まで編集可能。
🔒 プライバシー第一: 画像データは外部サーバーに送信されず、すべてローカル（あなたのブラウザ内）で処理されます。安心してご利用ください。

🚀 こんな場面で大活躍:

レビューやバグ報告：矢印付きのスクリーンショットを一瞬でSlack/Teamsに共有。
ドキュメント作成：マニュアルや手順書に、注釈入りの画像をサッと挿入。
メール返信：相手からのスクリーンショットの質問箇所に、赤ペンで丸をつけて即返信。
ぜひ「Annotation Paste」をインストールして、毎日の作業を劇的にスピードアップさせてください！
ショートカットや右クリックなしでコピペができる魔法のようなツールです。

✨ マジコピとは？ ✨

「マジコピ」は、ウェブページ上のテキストコピー＆ペースト操作を、まるで魔法のように直感的に行えるようにするChrome拡張機能です。もう面倒なショートカットキーや右クリックは必要ありません！

主な機能:

  • マウスでテキストを選択すると、カーソルの近くに「コピーバブル」がフワッと出現！クリックするだけでコピー完了です。
  • テキスト入力欄にフォーカスすると、カーソルの近くに「ペーストバブル」がフワッと出現！クリックするだけでペーストできます。
  • 成功時にはキラキラとした魔法のようなエフェクトでお知らせ✨
  • シンプルで邪魔にならないデザイン。

こんな方におすすめ:

  • ショートカットキーを覚えるのが苦手な方
  • マウス操作中心で作業したい方
  • よりスムーズで快適なブラウジングを求める方

ぜひ「マジコピ」で、新しいコピペ体験をお試しください！

ご意見・ご要望はサポートメールアドレスまでお気軽にお寄せください。
A modern text expander with configurable triggers, search, and advanced formatting.

Pro Text Expander: Ultimate Autocomplete & Shortcuts 🚀

Short Description:
Stop repetitive typing! 😩 Create custom shortcuts to instantly expand text, insert formatted content, and automate your writing on any website. ⚡️

Detailed Description:
Elevate your productivity and type smarter with Pro Text Expander, the ultimate tool for creating and managing text shortcuts. 🧠 Whether you're a customer support agent, a developer, a marketer, or just someone who wants to type less, this extension will revolutionize your workflow. 📈

Core Features:

⚡️ Instant Text Expansion: The main function is simple and powerful. Create a shortcut like `/email` and have it instantly expand to `my-professional-email@example.com` the moment you type it followed by a space. It works seamlessly across all websites, including in rich text editors and complex web apps. ✨

💡 Inline Autocomplete Search: As you begin to type a shortcut, a helpful suggestion box appears right by your cursor, showing you matching snippets. You can select a suggestion to expand it immediately, saving you from memorizing every shortcut. 👇

🎨 Rich Formatting Tools: Go beyond plain text. Use the built-in editor to easily make your expanded text bold, italic, >underline, or even use your own HTML for things like lists and links.

⚙️ Advanced Snippet Management:

  * Tags & Filtering 🏷️: Organize your shortcuts with custom tags (e.g., "work," "code," "personal"). The options page allows you to filter your entire collection by tags or by searching for keywords.
  * Top-of-the-List Adding 🆕: New shortcuts are conveniently added to the top of the list for immediate access.
  * Easy Import/Export 🔄: A robust CSV import/export feature lets you back up your snippets or add them in bulk.
  * Reset Function 🧼: A "Reset All" button is available for when you want a clean slate.

🤖 Dynamic Placeholders:

  * `{{date}}`: Automatically inserts today's date. 📅
  * `{{time}}`: Automatically inserts the current time. ⏰
  * `$|$`: Lets you control exactly where your cursor lands after the text expands, allowing you to continue typing without interruption. 🎯

Pro Text Expander is more than just a text expander; it's a comprehensive tool designed for maximum efficiency and reliability. ✅ Install today and reclaim hours of your time! 🎉

Data Scraper 1 extracts data out of HTML web pages and imports it into Microsoft Excel of Google Sheets. Whether you're a market researcher, data analyst, or a student gathering information, Data Scraper 1 simplifies the process of finding and collecting web data at the click of a button.
Easy Table: Smart Web Data Extractor
Extract, preview, and export HTML tables to Excel, CSV, PDF, or Images. Features smart auto-locate and local-first privacy.

Easy Table: Smart Web Data Extractor
Stop manual copy-pasting! Extract web tables to Excel, CSV, PDF, or Images in seconds with Easy Table.

Easy Table is a high-performance productivity tool designed for data analysts, researchers, and professionals. It automatically identifies HTML tables on any website and converts them into structured data ready for your workflow. Whether it’s financial reports, market research, or lead lists, Easy Table makes data extraction effortless.

🚀 Key Features
Smart Table Detection: Instantly identifies all table elements on a page with zero configuration.

Instant Data Preview: No more guessing. Click any table in the list to preview the first few rows of data directly in the popup before exporting.

Smart Hover & Locate: Simply hover your mouse over a table in the list, and the extension will automatically scroll to and highlight the corresponding table on the original webpage.

Multi-Format Export:

Excel (.xlsx) & CSV: Fully compatible with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, and Numbers.

PDF & PNG Image: High-quality exports perfect for presentations and offline reports.

Markdown & JSON: Developer-friendly formats for Notion, Obsidian, or coding projects.

📥 Universal Import: Now supports importing data from Clipboard, Excel (XLSX), and CSV directly into the editor for instant cleaning and formatting.

🎨 Refined UI Experience: Smarter table naming and enhanced preview with the first 5 records kept intact for context during editing.

🛠️ Polished PDF & PNG: Fixed the header duplication in PDF exports and resolved character encoding issues in PNG/Image exports.

📖 Enhanced Guidance: Redesigned Settings and Help pages for a smoother onboarding experience.

🔒 Privacy-First Design
Your data stays where it belongs: on your computer.

Local-First Processing: 100% of the extraction and conversion happens locally in your browser.

Zero Server Uploads: We never transmit your table content or personal browsing history to any external servers.

No Accounts Needed: Start extracting immediately without the need for sign-ups or logins.

Who is Easy Table for?
Data Analysts: Quickly grab raw data for cleaning and analysis.

Marketers: Collect competitor pricing, directory listings, or social stats.

Researchers: Gather academic data for thesis or institutional projects.

Sales Teams: Effortlessly build lead lists from web directories.

Stop wasting time on manual data entry. Experience the smartest way to grab web data with Easy Table today!
